meaning: adj.逃亡的,无常的,易变的n.逃亡者,亡命者,难捕捉之物
examples: The detention of the fugitive was lawful.
He was just another fugitive to us.
It would lead them to a fugitive, who was hiding on the floor of his boat.
The investigation is ongoing, and Jesus Chavez's alleged co-conspirator, Carlos Gomez, remains a fugitive.
